! Title: ShieldNova - Services / Chatgpt
! Description: Domain set for Chatgpt traffic routing.
! Author: Harry (https://github.com/harryheros)
! Homepage: https://github.com/harryheros/shieldnova

! Profile: Conservative / Compatibility-First
! Built: 2026-04-28 00:14:00 UTC
! Total: 8
! Breakdown: service_rules=8

! ============================================================================
! ShieldNova - Services / ChatGPT & OpenAI
! Domain set for routing OpenAI/ChatGPT traffic through proxy nodes.
! ============================================================================

||openai.com^                             ! OpenAI - main platform
||chatgpt.com^                            ! ChatGPT - conversational AI
||chat.openai.com^                        ! ChatGPT - web interface
||api.openai.com^                         ! OpenAI - API endpoint
||auth0.openai.com^                       ! OpenAI - authentication
||platform.openai.com^                    ! OpenAI - developer platform
||oaiusercontent.com^                     ! OpenAI - user-generated content CDN
||oaistatic.com^                          ! OpenAI - static assets
